item.title: Better OAuth Security for your Core SaaS Applications
item.description: Improve OAuth security for critical SaaS applications. Discover best practices for token management, scope control, and integration protection.

item.title: Behind the breach: ShinyHunters' 2026 voice phishing campaign
item.description: Incident analysis of a voice phishing campaign linked to ShinyHunters-style tradecraft. Attackers compromise Okta accounts, enroll MFA persistence, and exfiltrate SaaS data.

item.title: Behind The Breach: Self-Service Password Reset (SSPR) Abuse in Azure AD
item.description: Investigate Azure AD SSPR abuse in real breaches. Learn how attackers exploit self-service password reset and how to secure this critical feature.

item.title: Behind the Breach: Phishing & Token Compromise in SaaS Environments
item.description: Analyze phishing campaigns targeting SaaS tokens. Understand credential theft techniques, token compromise patterns, and defense strategies.

item.title: Behind the Breach: Pass-The-Cookie Beyond IdPs
item.description: Investigate pass-the-cookie attacks beyond identity providers. Learn how session tokens are stolen and replayed to bypass authentication controls.

item.title: Behind The Breach: MFA Everywhere, Yes. MFA For Everyone, No.
item.description: Analyze real breaches where MFA coverage gaps enabled attacks. Learn why universal MFA deployment is critical for enterprise security.

item.title: Behind the Breach: Malicious Attack on Cyberhaven’s Chrome Extension Developer Team
item.description: OBSIDIAN THREAT RESEARCH TEAM

item.title: Behind the Breach: Cross-tenant Impersonation in Okta
item.description: Analyze cross-tenant impersonation attacks in Okta. Understand the vulnerability, attack vectors, and security controls to prevent identity spoofing.

item.title: Are Your ServiceNow ACLs Publicly Exposing Data?
item.description: Audit ServiceNow ACLs to prevent data exposure. Learn how misconfigured access controls can leak sensitive information and how to secure your instance.

item.title: Life of a Phish
item.description: Anatomy of a phishing attack targeting SaaS. Dissect real campaigns, understand tactics, and implement effective defenses.

item.title: An Open Letter to the SaaS Industry: Make Security the Default
item.description: A call for shared standards, stronger transparency, and vendor accountability across the SaaS ecosystem

item.title: The AISPM Market Guide: Navigating AI Security Posture Management
item.description: Navigate the AI Security Posture Management market with expert guidance. Understand AISPM solutions, vendors, and implementation strategies for enterprise scale.

item.title: AI Security Testing: Protecting Models and Agents From Adversarial Exploits
item.description: Protect AI models and agents from adversarial exploits with rigorous security testing. Implement continuous validation for autonomous systems.

item.title: The Top AI Security Risks Facing Enterprises in 2025
item.description: Identify the most critical AI security risks threatening enterprises in 2025 and learn actionable strategies to protect your AI infrastructure and data.

item.title: AI Security Posture Management: Continuous Protection for AI Agents
item.description: Implement continuous AI security posture management for autonomous agents. Maintain visibility, control, and protection across distributed AI systems.

item.title: Bridging the Gap Between AI Security and Governance
item.description: Bridge the gap between AI security and governance. Build unified frameworks that ensure compliance, risk management, and protection across enterprise AI.

item.title: AI Security Best Practices: Building a Foundation for Responsible Innovation
item.description: Implement proven AI security best practices that balance innovation, governance, and compliance across enterprise AI initiatives.

item.title: AI Security Automation: Reducing Human Error and Speeding Response
item.description: Reduce human error and accelerate incident response with AI security automation. Deploy intelligent systems that detect and remediate threats automatically.

item.title: AI Safety Benchmarks: How to Evaluate and Certify Secure Models
item.description: Learn how to evaluate and certify secure AI models using safety benchmarks. Implement testing frameworks that ensure model reliability and trustworthiness.

item.title: Inside the AI Risk Repository: Mapping the Threat Landscape
item.description: Explore the AI Risk Repository and map the evolving threat landscape. Access comprehensive intelligence on AI vulnerabilities and attack patterns.

item.title: AI Risk Mitigation: Turning Compliance Into Continuous Protection
item.description: Transform compliance into continuous protection with AI risk mitigation strategies. Implement proactive defenses that evolve with your enterprise AI systems.

item.title: AI Red Teaming Services: How Enterprises Validate AI Resilience
item.description: Validate enterprise AI resilience with professional red teaming services. Engage experts who simulate attacks and strengthen your defenses.

item.title: AI Red Teaming: How Enterprises Test and Harden Their AI Systems
item.description: Test and harden enterprise AI systems through structured red teaming exercises. Validate defenses against real-world adversarial scenarios.

item.title: The Top AI Pentesting Tools for LLMs and Autonomous Agents
item.description: Assess LLM and agent resilience with leading AI pentesting tools. Discover platforms that identify vulnerabilities in language models and autonomous systems.

item.title: AI Penetration Testing: Finding and Fixing AI Weaknesses
item.description: Find and fix AI vulnerabilities through comprehensive penetration testing. Identify weaknesses in models, agents, and infrastructure before attackers do.

item.title: AI Guardrails: Enforcing Safety Without Slowing Innovation
item.description: See how AI guardrails help teams enforce safety, policy, and ethics while maintaining speed and creativity in enterprise AI development.

item.title: AI Exploits and Model Compromise: How Attackers Target the AI Supply Chain
item.description: Understand how attackers exploit vulnerabilities across the AI supply chain. Learn to protect models, dependencies, and infrastructure from compromise.

item.title: AI Detection and Response: Extending SaaS XDR to Agentic Systems
item.description: Explore how AI detection and response extends SaaS XDR capabilities to secure autonomous agents and agentic systems in modern enterprise environments.

item.title: AI Data Poisoning: How Corrupted Data Undermines Trust in Agents
item.description: Understand how AI data poisoning attacks corrupt training data and compromise model integrity. Learn detection methods and mitigation strategies to protect your AI systems.

item.title: AI Application Security: Safeguarding Data, Code, and Behavior
item.description: Learn how to secure AI applications by protecting models, data flows, and runtime behavior from emerging vulnerabilities and abuse.

item.title: AI agents are silently changing how data leaves your apps. Here’s how to stay ahead.
item.description: AI agent activity grew 300x in 2025. Shadow agents, overprivileged credentials, and chained workflows are creating blind spots your SIEM can't see. Here's what to do about it.

item.title: Top AI Agent Security Risks and How to Mitigate Them
item.description: Identify the leading AI agent security risks of 2025 and discover practical steps to mitigate threats to data, models, and infrastructure.

item.title: Building an AI Agent Security Framework for Enterprise-Scale AI
item.description: Build AI agent security frameworks that scale across enterprise systems. Implement unified controls for identity, access, and behavior monitoring.

item.title: AI Agents Are Rewriting SaaS Security. Are You Ready?
item.description: Discover how AI agents are transforming SaaS security requirements. Learn why traditional controls fall short and what new protections enterprises need.

item.title: AI Agent Protection: Safeguarding Identities, Access, and Behavior
item.description: Safeguard AI agent identities, access controls, and runtime behavior. Implement comprehensive protection strategies for autonomous systems.

item.title: Real-Time AI Agent Monitoring: Detecting Threats Before They Escalate
item.description: Detect AI agent threats in real time with advanced monitoring tools. Implement continuous surveillance that identifies anomalies before they escalate.

item.title: The 2025 AI Agent Security Landscape: Players, Trends, and Risks
item.description: Review the top AI agent security trends, vendors, and threats shaping the 2025 landscape of autonomous systems and intelligent tools.

item.title: From Agentic AI to Autonomous Risk: Why Security Must Evolve
item.description: Understand how growing AI autonomy changes enterprise risk and why adaptive, multi-layered security is crucial for modern organizations.

item.title: Adversarial Prompt Engineering: The Dark Art of Manipulating LLMs
item.description: Learn how adversarial prompt engineering exploits LLM vulnerabilities and discover techniques to detect and prevent prompt manipulation attacks on language models.

item.title: Adversarial Machine Learning: Understanding and Preventing Model Exploitation
item.description: Explore adversarial machine learning threats and discover proven defense strategies to prevent model exploitation and safeguard AI systems from manipulation attacks.

item.title: What is Account Takeover? ATO Attacks Explained
item.description: Account takeover (ATO) attacks use valid credentials to compromise accounts. Learn 8 attack methods, detection techniques, and response strategies for 2026.

item.title: Access Token vs Refresh Token: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Learn how access tokens and refresh tokens create different threat models. Understand detection challenges and why both bypass MFA in your SaaS environment.

item.title: From noise to clarity: Accelerate your SaaS security operations with Obsidian AI Assistant
item.description: Cut through SaaS security noise. Obsidian AI Assistant helps teams prioritize risks, simplify remediation, and respond faster with confidence.

item.title: A Practical Guide for Handling Unauthorized Access to Snowflake
item.description: Practical guide for handling unauthorized Snowflake access. Learn incident response steps, detection methods, and prevention strategies for data warehouse security.

item.title: Understanding every layer of your SaaS Supply Chain Security: From VRMs to OAuths
item.description: SaaS supply chain security can be confusing. This comprehensive guide breaks down the different solutions (SBOM, VRM, CI/CD) and explains the critical risks of SaaS-to-SaaS integrations.

item.title: 2025 NYDFS Deadlines Expose SaaS Security Gaps—How to Avoid Paying Millions in Fines
item.description: Learn how to meet NYDFS cybersecurity compliance requirnments for SaaS. Understand NYDFS 500 cybersecurity requirements, MFA rules, and how to avoid fines under NYDFS regulations. Obsidian maps NYDFS cyber regulations to SaaS controls for easier audits.

item.title: 2020: The Year of SaaS
item.description: Explore how 2020 became the defining year for SaaS adoption and what it means for enterprise security. Understand the shift to cloud-first operations.

item.title: Data Guardianship – GDPR: Live it, Love it
item.description: Build comprehensive data inventories and mappings for SaaS. Discover where sensitive data lives and how it flows across applications.

item.title: Emerging Identity Threats: The Muddy Waters of Residential Proxies
item.description: Navigate emerging identity threats from residential proxies. Understand how attackers use legitimate infrastructure to evade detection.

item.title: Behind the Shield: Cracking the Limits of Okta FastPass
item.description: Explore the security limits of Okta FastPass. Learn about phishing-resistant authentication, potential weaknesses, and additional protective controls.
